name: Pack Of 12 – Spectrum Gusto Lick Snack For Dog With Beef And Sweet Potato 4x15g
shortDescription: Spectrum Gusto Lick Snack Beef & Sweet Potato is a creamy lickable dog treat made with real chicken, beef, and sweet potato, offering a low-fat, high-moisture reward for daily treating and bonding.
description: Spectrum Gusto Lick Snack Beef & Sweet Potato is a smooth, creamy lickable dog treat made with real chicken, flavorful beef, and nutritious sweet potato, designed to deliver a tasty reward in a light, easy-to-serve format. Its soft texture makes spoon-feeding simple and enjoyable, helping create positive bonding moments during daily routines. With 32% chicken and 4% beef , this lick snack provides high-quality animal protein to support muscle maintenance, while sweet potato (4%) adds natural carbohydrates and gentle fiber. The high moisture content helps support daily hydration, and the low-fat formulation makes it suitable for frequent treating when fed responsibly. Sunflower oil enhances palatability, while a carefully selected flavor enhancer made from chicken liver and heart digest boosts aroma and acceptance. Spectrum Gusto Lick Snack Beef & Sweet Potato is ideal as a dessert, reward, or enrichment treat alongside a complete and balanced diet. Ingredients Water Chicken (32%) Tapioca starch Beef (4%) Sweet potato (4%) Sunflower oil Flavour enhancer (chicken liver & heart digest, pea protein, salt) Nutritional Composition Crude Protein: 10% Crude Fat: 1.5% Crude Ash: 0.5% Crude Fibre: 0.1% Moisture: 80% Feeding Recommendations & Warnings Treat calories should not exceed 10% of a dog’s total daily caloric intake Serve as a reward, dessert, or everyday treat Always provide fresh drinking water Not suitable for human consumption
